[[BLOCK:slide4_shape1]]
Package: 'rgl'  
Date: September 26, 2022  
Version: 0.110.2  
Title: 3D Visualization Using OpenGL  

**Depends:**  
- R (>= 3.3.0)  

**Suggests:**  
- MASS, rmarkdown, deldir (>= 1.0-4), orientlib, lattice, misc3d, magick, plotrix (>= 3.7-3), tripack, interp, alphashape3d, teltk, js (>= 1.2), webshot2 (>= 0.1.0), downlit (>= 0.4.0), pkgdown (>= 2.0.0), extrafont, shiny, manipulateWidget (>= 0.9.0), testhat, markdown, crostalk, V8, chromote  

**Imports:**  
- graphics, grDevices, stats, utils, htmlwidgets, htmltools, knitr (>= 1.33), jsonlite (>= 0.9.20), magrittr, R6, base64enc, mime  

**Enhances:**  
- waldo  

**Description:**  
Provides medium to high-level functions for 3D interactive graphics, including functions modeled on base graphics (e.g., `plot3d`) as well as functions for constructing representations of geometric objects (e.g., `cube3d`). Output may be displayed on screen using OpenGL or exported to various standard 3D file formats, including WebGL, PLY, OBJ, STL, as well as 2D image formats, including PNG, Postscript, SVG, and PDF.  

**License:**  
GPL  

**URL:**  
- <https://github.com/dmurdoch/rgl>  
- <https://dmurdoch.github.io/rgl/>  

**System Requirements:**  
- OpenGL and GLU Library (required for display in R; see "Installing OpenGL support" in README.md. Not needed if only browser displays using `rglwidget` are wanted.)  
- zlib (optional)  
- libpng (>= 1.2.9, optional)  
- FreeType (optional)  
- pandoc (>= 1.14, needed for vignettes)  

**Bug Reports:**  
- <https://github.com/dmurdoch/rgl/issues>  

**Vignette Builder:**  
- knitr, rmarkdown  

**Biarch:**  
- true  

**Roxygen Note:**  
- 7.20  

**Needs Compilation:**  
- yes
